display.purpose: Product name in Neorgon header bar only.

title.purpose: External site name on each catalog row.

label.purpose: Sidebar section labels and hub badge.

shadows.name: row-hover
shadows.purpose: Site row lift on hover only.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for row hover and pill transitions.

components.name: List pill
components.description: Sidebar or wrapped filter for curated lists.
components.css: .ds-list-pill { width: 100%; text-align: left; border: 1px solid transparent; background: transparent; color: #c4c6cf; font-family: 'Avenir Next', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-list-pill:hover { background: oklch(0.2 0.015 280 / 0.55); color: #f7f7f9; } .ds-list-pill:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f97316; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: List pill active
components.css: .ds-list-pill--active { background: oklch(0.72 0.17 45 / 0.14); border-color: oklch(0.72 0.17 45 / 0.35); color: #f7f7f9; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Ghost button
components.description: Clear search and secondary toolbar actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { border: 1px solid #ffffff1a; background: transparent; color: #c4c6cf; font-family: 'Avenir Next', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.2 0.015 280 / 0.55); color: #f7f7f9; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f97316; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Site row
components.description: Primary catalog entry: preview column + metadata body.
components.html:
example.comOn hub

Example Tool

Short reason to keep this tab open.

whiteboard
components.css: .ds-site-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 220px 1fr; min-height: 148px; background: #12151c; border: 1px solid #ffffff1a; border-radius: 14px; overflow: hidden; text-decoration: none; color: #f7f7f9; transition: border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-site-row:hover { border-color: #ffffff29; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.35); } .ds-site-row:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f97316; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-site-row__preview { background: oklch(0.14 0.02 280); overflow: hidden; } .ds-site-row__preview img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; min-height: 148px; display: block; } .ds-site-row__body { padding: 18px 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-site-row__domain { font-size: 0.78rem; color: #8e9099; } .ds-site-row__hub { font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #f97316; background: oklch(0.72 0.17 45 / 0.14); padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 4px; } .ds-site-row__name { font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.25; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin: 0; } .ds-site-row__desc { font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.55; color: #c4c6cf; margin: 0; } .ds-site-row__tag { font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 5px; background: oklch(0.25 0.02 280 / 0.6); color: #8e9099; }

components.name: Search field
components.description: Toolbar search with icon and glass surface.
components.css: .ds-search { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex: 1; min-width: 0; padding: 0 14px; height: 44px; background: oklch(0.2 0.015 280 / 0.55); border: 1px solid #ffffff1a; border-radius: 12px; } .ds-search__input { flex: 1; border: none; background: transparent; color: #f7f7f9; font-family: 'Avenir Next', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; outline: none; } .ds-search__input::placeholder { color: #8e9099; } .ds-search:focus-within { border-color: #ffffff29; }

narrative.overview: Awesome Sites is a bookmark shelf for external tools, not a marketing landing page. Preview-first horizontal rows, sidebar list filters, and a restrained amber accent on the Neorgon dark shell. Depth from elevated surfaces and a single hover lift — not glass cards or gradient glows.
keyCharacteristics: Committed amber accent on filters, kicker, links, and hub badges only
OKLCH-tinted neutrals on violet-ink night background
Sidebar list navigation on desktop; wrapped pills on mobile
API/editor notes in collapsed details panel

rules.name: The Preview Carries Color Rule
rules.body: Per-site accent colors from JSON are not painted across entire cards. Visual interest comes from screenshot or SVG previews.

rules.name: The Amber Budget Rule
rules.body: Signal amber appears on selection state, metadata kicker, hub chip, and links. It never fills large background areas except the soft active pill wash.

rules.name: The Domain Stays Quiet Rule
rules.body: Domain names use muted 0.78rem tabular numerals. Never uppercase accent treatment.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Site rows have no glow pseudo-elements, no dashed borders, and no gradient overlays. Motion and shadow appear only on hover or focus.

dos: Do lead each external site with a preview image and fall back to a neutral placeholder on error.
Do use horizontal preview + copy rows for the main feed.
Do keep list filters in a sticky sidebar on viewports ≥820px.
Do use OKLCH for CSS custom properties; tint neutrals toward violet ink.
Do limit amber accent to selection, links, kicker, and hub metadata.
Do collapse editor/API documentation into the bottom details panel.
donts: Don't use identical auto-fill card grids with icon + heading + blurb repeats.
Don't add dashed borders, gradient ::before glows, or per-card neon halos.
Don't put EXTERNAL or letter-avatar badges on every row.
Don't use glassmorphism on catalog surfaces (header blur is Neorgon-standard only).
Don't use gradient text, hero metric blocks, or uppercase shouting domains.
Don't use colored left-border stripes greater than 1px on rows or callouts.
Don't park make api / data/sites.json instructions in the main intro.
Don't animate layout properties; only border-color, transform, and box-shadow on rows.
